summary: Final frozen HEAD 2411506a passes runtime_contract review: surface-aware defaults, content and legacy merge-delta reuse, fail-closed boundaries, explicit strict-head compatibility, dirty fingerprints, inspection inputs, provenance, and lifecycle remain intact; the added preflight-DAG expectation correctly recognizes the content-binding stale reason without weakening failure semantics.

Initial concern that Node-version behavior remained unverified -> resolved by the reported Node 22 compatibility E2E 2/2 and an independent same-HEAD replay of the changed DAG E2E with 2/2 passing on Node v23.11.0.

Initial concern that reuse weakened review governance -> resolved by unchanged inspection-summary/input, judgment-delta, separate-agent provenance, authorize-start-close lifecycle, and dirty-fingerprint requirements covered by the current 39-test inspection-first suite.
